{{nihongo|'''Sawara Shrine'''|佐波良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mimasaka Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sawara Shrine'''|佐波良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mimasaka Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sawara Shrine'''|佐波良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mimasaka Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sawara Shrine'''|佐波良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mimasaka Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sawara Shrine'''|佐波良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mimasaka Province]].
